labels.text: Vector databases store embeddings and use nearest-neighbor retrieval to find semantically similar records.
Retrieval augmented generation combines retrieved context with a language model before producing an answer.
Building on indexing workflows, adaptive freshness budgets connect familiar retrieval operations to per-query update decisions.
A new result shows that query-specific freshness budgets cut stale-answer errors by 31 percent without increasing median latency.
The evaluation finds that confidence-triggered reindexing reduces write amplification by 42 percent on bursty workloads.
For teams already monitoring drift, confidence-triggered reindexing provides a bridge from familiar alerts to selective refresh actions.
The appendix repeats deployment checklists that experienced operators already use.
A vendor pricing comparison lists subscription tiers without affecting the technical conclusions.
